register: 鲁迅-inflected technical 随笔 · 本科生 voice · self-deprecating + dry-ironic
cadenceNotes: short cutting sentences mixed with one long winding sentence per paragraph — NEVER uniformly paced
bitter understatement over emotion: 「这倒也没什么」about things that matter quite a lot
self-mockery as critique vehicle — mock yourself before mocking the subject
specific objects/scenes ground abstract claims (the half-used 0.5 中性笔, the unread textbook, the dormitory at midnight)
「」 used for sham-piety on terms that should not pass unexamined: 「学习」「实践」「契合生态」「主流路径」
dry-irony transitions: 不过 + a deflating clause beats 然而/但是 alone
endings flat or sharp — concrete object / quoted dialogue / unfinished promise — NEVER inspirational
破折号 used twice or fewer per article; em-dash carries rhythm not embellishment
forbiddenPhrases: 我大概是要继续这样下去的
openingPattern: concrete fact-hook OR specific scene — NEVER 众所周知 / 随着...发展 / 在当今
endingPattern: concrete object OR quoted dialogue OR unfinished promise (the half-written GitHub README, the 0.5 中性笔 stub, HR's pen stopping) — never abstraction
